name: Spit-Roasted Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the inside of the chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Truss the chicken. Push the spit through it starting at the breast end.
3. Dry the chicken thoroughly, rub with butter, and sprinkle with salt.
4. Secure strips of blanched bacon over the breast and thighs with string.
5. Use moderate heat and roast for about 1 1/2 to 1 3/4 hours.
6. Remove the bacon 15 minutes before the end.
7. Baste with pan drippings until the chicken is browned and done.
